recommendations.title: Clash by Night
recommendations.overview: An embittered woman seeks escape in marriage, only to fall for her husband’s best friend.

recommendations.title: Metropolis
recommendations.overview: In a futuristic city sharply divided between the rich and the poor, the son of the city's mastermind meets a prophet who predicts the coming of a savior to mediate their differences.

recommendations.title: While the City Sleeps
recommendations.overview: Newspaper men compete against each other to find a serial killer dubbed "The Lipstick Killer".

recommendations.title: Die Nibelungen: Siegfried
recommendations.overview: Siegfried, son of King Siegmund of Xanten, travels to Worms, capital of the Burgundian kingdom, to ask King Gunther for the hand of his sister, the beautiful Kriemhild.

recommendations.title: The Woman in the Window
recommendations.overview: A seductive woman gets an innocent professor mixed up in murder.

recommendations.title: The Big Heat
recommendations.overview: After the suspicious suicide of a fellow cop, tough homicide detective Dave Bannion takes the law into his own hands when he sets out to smash a vicious crime syndicate.

recommendations.title: M
recommendations.overview: In this classic German thriller, Hans Beckert, a serial killer who preys on children, becomes the focus of a massive Berlin police manhunt. Beckert's heinous crimes are so repellant and disruptive to city life that he is even targeted by others in th

recommendations.title: Woman in the Moon
recommendations.overview: A scientist discovers that there's gold on the moon. He builds a rocket to fly there, but there's too much rivalry among the crew to have a successful expedition.

recommendations.title: Die Nibelungen: Kriemhild's Revenge
recommendations.overview: When Kriemhild, thirsty for revenge, marries to Etzel, king of the Huns, she invites King Gunther and his court to visit them, intending to finally take the life of the man responsible of her disgrace.

recommendations.title: Rancho Notorious
recommendations.overview: A man in search of revenge infiltrates a ranch, hidden in an inhospitable region, where its owner, Altar Keane, gives shelter to outlaws fleeing from the law in exchange for a price.
